texto: The strength of a woman is not measured by the impact that all her hardships in life have had on her
autor: but the strength of a woman is measured by the extent of her refusal to allow those hardships to dictate her and who she becomes.
explicacao: Citação de but the strength of a woman is measured by the extent of her refusal to allow those hardships to dictate her and who she becomes. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The strength of a woman is not measured by the impact that all her hardships in life have had on her” articula reflexao, c-joybell-c, strength em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
